offline.message: No internet connection. You can still read cached mail.

sidebar.forceResyncMessage: All locally stored emails for this account will be deleted and re-downloaded from the server. Continue?

attachments.noAttachments: Attachments from your emails will appear here

compose.subject: Subject
compose.enterRecipient: Please enter at least one recipient
compose.selectAccount: Please select an account to send from
compose.scheduledInPast: Scheduled time must be in the future.
compose.manyRecipientsMessage: This message will be sent to {{count}} recipients. Continue?
compose.saveDraftMessage: Do you want to save this message as a draft or discard it?
compose.noSubjectMessage: This email has no subject. Do you want to send it anyway?

mailDetail.permanentDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
mailDetail.selectEmailDesc: Choose an email from the list to read it

dawn: The day is still ahead of you.
A new morning, a blank page.
day: Pick an email from the list.
dusk: One last look, then call it a day.

dawn: A good start to the day.
dusk: Into the evening with an empty inbox.

mailList.selectFolderDesc: Choose a folder from the sidebar to view emails

settings.title: Settings
settings.discardMessage: Your changes have not been saved yet. Discard them?
settings.mailtoFailed: Could not change default mail app

privacy.trackerBlockingDesc: Tracking pixels, hidden images and known tracking domains are removed from every email automatically. Always on.
privacy.externalImagesDesc: Control per account whether remote images in emails are loaded. Blocking them prevents senders from seeing when you open an email.
privacy.stripTrackingParamsDesc: Strips utm_, fbclid, gclid and similar tracking parameters when opening links from emails.

settings.undoSendDelayDesc: Time to cancel a sent email. Set to Off to send immediately.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how Prudii Mail looks. "System" follows your Windows theme automatically.
appearance.transparentSidebarDesc: The desktop shows through behind the sidebar
appearance.ambientSidebarDesc: Subtly tints the sidebar with the time of day

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language of the user interface.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Click an account to edit its settings and signature.

appSettings.title: App Settings
appSettings.description: Configure how Prudii Mail behaves on your system.
appSettings.launchOnStartupDesc: Start Prudii Mail when you log in
appSettings.showInTrayDesc: Keep running in background when closed
appSettings.use24hClockDesc: Display times in 24-hour format (14:30 vs 2:30 PM)
appSettings.showAllUnreadCounts: Show unread counts for all folders
appSettings.showAllUnreadCountsDesc: Display unread count badges on all folders, not just Inbox
appSettings.notificationsDesc: Show a notification when new emails arrive during sync
appSettings.notificationSoundDesc: Play a sound when new emails arrive
appSettings.defaultMailAppDesc: Handle mailto: links from your browser and other apps

account.displayNameDesc: The name shown in the sidebar and email headers.
account.accountColorDesc: Choose a color to identify this account in the sidebar.
account.autoSyncDesc: Automatically check for new emails at regular intervals.
account.serverSettingsDesc: IMAP and SMTP connection details. Only change if you know what you're doing.
account.signatureDesc: Your signature will be automatically added to emails based on your settings below.
account.signatureOnReply: Add signature to replies and forwards
account.loadExternalImagesDesc: Allow loading of remote images in emails. Disabling this improves privacy but some emails may look incomplete.
account.passwordDesc: Leave empty to keep the current password. Only enter a new password if you need to change it.
account.oauthHint: This account uses OAuth sign-in (Google/Microsoft). To restore it after a backup, remove the account and re-add it using the sign-in flow.
account.syncWarning1Min: Some providers may throttle or temporarily block your account with this frequency.

license.title: License
license.description: Manage your Prudii Mail license and subscription.
license.loginDesc: Sign in with your Prudii account to activate your license.
license.activateDesc: Enter your license key to unlock Premium or Team features.
license.freePlanDesc: Up to 3 email accounts. Log in or activate a key to unlock Premium.
license.offlineGrace: License verification pending. Using cached license.
license.tamperDetected: License integrity check failed. Please verify your license.
license.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Sign in again to keep your license in sync — your features stay available in the meantime.

deleteAccountConfirm.title: Delete account?
deleteAccountConfirm.body: All locally cached mails for this account will be removed. The account on the server is not affected.

info.title: About
info.description: Information about the installed version of Prudii Mail.

update.title: Software Update
update.checksumError: Integrity check failed — download may be compromised. Aborted.

accentColor.title: Accent Color
accentColor.description: Choose a color for buttons, links and highlights.

density.title: Density
density.description: Adjust the spacing of the mail list.

ai.title: Local AI (Ollama)
ai.description: Use a locally running AI model to summarize emails and suggest replies. No data leaves your computer.
ai.ollamaNotRunning: Ollama is not running. Please start Ollama and try again.
ai.ollamaTimeout: Ollama is not responding. Please check if it is running.
ai.noModels: No models found. Run 'ollama pull llama3.2' to download a model.
ai.testFirst: Test connection to see available models
ai.ollamaRequired: Ollama must be installed and running separately.
ai.recommendationDesc: For email summaries and reply suggestions, 7B–8B models offer the best balance of speed and quality.
ai.modelRecLarge: Higher quality, slower — needs powerful hardware
ai.quickStart: Quick start: run "ollama pull llama3.2" or "ollama pull gemma3" in your terminal.
ai.premiumDesc: Local AI features are available with a Premium subscription.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Export your data as a ZIP file or restore from a previous backup.
backup.passwordsNeededDesc: The following accounts need their passwords re-entered in account settings:
backup.mergeHint: "Merge" will skip these accounts. "Replace" will delete and re-import them.
backup.passwordHint: Passwords are not included in backups. You will need to re-enter them after restore.
backup.oauthNeededDesc: The following accounts use OAuth (Google/Microsoft) and cannot be restored from a backup. Please remove and re-add them:

welcome.title: Welcome to Prudii Mail
welcome.tagline: Your private, local-first inbox. Add an account to get started.
welcome.privacy: Your emails stay on your device — no tracking, no cloud.

wizard.chooseProviderDesc: Select your email provider to get started quickly
wizard.accountAddedDesc: Your account has been added and emails have been synced.
wizard.appPasswordHint: This provider requires an app-specific password.
wizard.browserOpened: A browser window has opened. Please sign in there.
wizard.oauthAtCapacity: {{provider}} sign-in is temporarily at capacity for new accounts. Please connect with an app password instead.
wizard.oauthAtCapacityMicrosoft: Note: Microsoft may have disabled app passwords for your account type (e.g. work/school accounts).
wizard.protonBridgeHint: ProtonMail requires the Proton Bridge app to be running on this computer.
wizard.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Please remove this account and add it again, making sure to grant all requested permissions.
wizard.emailConflict: The email address {{email}} is already connected as a {{existingProvider}} account. Tip: if your Outlook/Microsoft account uses a Gmail address as its primary address, the Microsoft sign-in returns that address and collides with your Google account. Remove the existing account first if you want to re-add it.

folder.systemFolderHint: System folders cannot be renamed or deleted
folder.emptyConfirmMessage: Do you want to permanently delete all {{count}} emails in {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
folder.deleteFolderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? All emails in this folder will be permanently deleted.
folder.cannotMoveDesc: Mails can only be moved between folders of the same account.

signature.imageTooLarge: Image too large. Maximum size is 500KB.

rules.title: Mail Rules
rules.description: Automatically sort, label, or archive incoming emails based on conditions.
rules.noRules: No rules yet. Create a rule to automatically process incoming emails.
rules.name: Rule Name
rules.priorityDesc: Higher priority rules are checked first.
rules.conditionsDesc: All conditions must match (AND logic). Leave empty to skip a condition.
rules.applyNowConfirm: Apply all enabled rules to the current inbox?
rules.applyNowResult: Applied to {{count}} messages — changes sync on the next sync.
rules.actionsDesc: What to do when all conditions match.
rules.premiumDesc: Mail rules are available with a Premium subscription.

linkCheck.warningMessage: This link may be unsafe. The following issues were detected:

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.confirmMessage: Do you want to unsubscribe from this mailing list?
unsubscribe.successMessage: You have been successfully unsubscribed from this mailing list.
unsubscribe.browserOpened: An unsubscribe page has been opened in your browser.

scheduled.noScheduledDesc: Schedule emails to be sent later from the compose window.
scheduled.failedMessage: Failed to send scheduled email "{{subject}}" after 3 attempts.

templates.title: Email Templates
templates.description: Create reusable email templates to save time on repetitive messages.
templates.noTemplates: No templates yet. Create one to get started.
templates.premiumDesc: Email templates are available with a Premium subscription.

splitInbox.title: Split Inbox
splitInbox.description: Automatically categorize incoming mail into tabs like Primary, Notifications, and Newsletters.
splitInbox.premiumDesc: Split Inbox is available with a Premium subscription.

autoLabels.title: Auto-Labels
autoLabels.description: Automatically classify emails by type using sender patterns and headers.
autoLabels.premiumDesc: Auto-Labels are available with a Premium subscription.

emptyDesc.inbox: No new messages in your inbox
emptyDesc.sent: Messages you send will appear here
emptyDesc.drafts: Start composing to create a draft
emptyDesc.starred: Star a message to find it here later

errors.sentFolderSaveTitle: Mail sent, but not saved to the Sent folder
errors.markAllRead: Failed to mark all as read
errors.countFolderMails: Could not load mail count — please try again

dataLocal.title: All data stored locally on your device

authFailed.title: Sign-in failed
authFailed.generic: The server rejected the credentials. Double-check your email and password.
authFailed.gmail: Gmail requires an App Password for IMAP access. Regular passwords will not work if 2-Step Verification is enabled.
authFailed.outlook: Outlook/Microsoft accounts with 2FA require an App Password. Regular passwords may not work.

tls.title: Secure connection failed
tls.detail: The server's TLS certificate could not be verified. This may indicate a misconfigured server or network interception.

connection.title: Cannot reach the server
connection.detail: Check the server address and port. Also verify your firewall or network is not blocking the connection.

dns.title: Server not found
dns.detail: The server address could not be resolved. Check for typos in the hostname.

timeout.title: Connection timed out
timeout.detail: The server did not respond in time. Try again, or check your internet connection.

unknown.title: Connection failed
unknown.detail: Unknown error. Check the server settings and try again.

emptyState.inboxZeroTitle: Inbox Zero — clean as a whistle
emptyState.inboxZeroDesc: You've handled everything. Enjoy the moment.
emptyState.noResultsDesc: Try different keywords or remove filters.

achievements.firstHundredDesc: Your inbox is ready to roll.
